mapper.sql: id, ding_id, school_type, school_belong, school_name, school_address, gaode_location, admin_id, delete_status, create_id, create_by, create_at, update_id, update_by, update_at, del_unique_key, dt, school_type_name, school_blong_name, school_belong_name
mapper.select:
SELECT si.school_name 学校名称, si.school_address 学校地址, CASE si.school_type WHEN '10899' THEN '民办学校' WHEN '10900' THEN '幼儿园' WHEN '10901' THEN '公办学校' ELSE '其他' END 学校类型, ss.name 所属区域 FROM school_info si LEFT JOIN school_setting ss ON si.school_belong = ss.id
AND ss.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{district}, '%')
AND si.school_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{schoolName}, '%')
AND si.school_address LIKE CONCAT('%', #{schoolAddress}, '%')
AND si.school_type = #{schoolType}

SELECT CASE si.school_type WHEN '10899' THEN '民办学校' WHEN '10900' THEN '幼儿园' WHEN '10901' THEN '公办学校' ELSE '其他' END 学校类型, count( 1 ) 数量 FROM school_info si LEFT JOIN school_setting ss ON si.school_belong = ss.id GROUP BY si.school_type
SELECT ss.NAME 所属区域, count( 1 ) 数量 FROM school_info si LEFT JOIN school_setting ss ON si.school_belong = ss.id GROUP BY ss.NAME
SELECT TABLE_NAME 表名, TABLE_COMMENT 表注释, TABLE_ROWS 数据行数 FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE () ORDER BY TABLE_NAME
